item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

item.title: Rescue USB Media Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Rescue USB Media Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Rescue USB Media Files
(Utilities)
Removable media data recovery software provided comprehensive solution to quickly recover missing office documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Access) files, unidentified compressed, zipped folders, subfolders, damaged audio, video clippings and erased photographs, snapshots from inaccessible removable media including picture card, smart media, flash memory card, memory stick, thumb, pen drive and many more. USB flash drive photo retrieval utility retrieves lost or erased files formats like DOC, TXT, JPEG, TIFF, MPEG, MOV, WAV, MIDI, RIFF, WAV from multimedia storage drives. Professional removable media files restoration application restores intentionally erased data lost due to formatting hard drives, virus attacks, software malfunction, unexpected system shutdown while you are accessing USB drives on your PC or laptop. Flash media data retrieval tool supports all major brands of removable media such as Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, Canon, Fujifilm, SanDisk, HP etc. Multimedia data salvage program recovers mp3, mp4 songs, video games from compact flash memory card of your digital device like iPod, music players in less amount of time. Software can easily runs on any window based operating system and provides facility to restores selected and complete data by following some easy recovery steps. Features:* Removable media data rescue software is reliable program to fastly recover entire virus infected pictures, text files and other relevant data from all USB removable media.* USB media files recovery tool instantly display unrecognized audio, video folders which cannot access by your digital device. * Smart drive data restoration tool quickly restores lost files from undetected hard drives and saves data in safe place.* Application has facility to consistently retrieve encrypted files folders along with their exact name, color and size from removable thumb, pen drive.

[read more]
item.description:
Rescue USB Media Files
(Utilities)
Removable media data recovery software provided comprehensive solution to quickly recover missing office documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Access) files, unidentified compressed, zipped folders, subfolders, damaged audio, video clippings and erased photographs, snapshots from inaccessible removable media including picture card, smart media, flash memory card, memory stick, thumb, pen drive and many more. USB flash drive photo retrieval utility retrieves lost or erased files formats like DOC, TXT, JPEG, TIFF, MPEG, MOV, WAV, MIDI, RIFF, WAV from multimedia storage drives. Professional removable media files restoration application restores intentionally erased data lost due to formatting hard drives, virus attacks, software malfunction, unexpected system shutdown while you are accessing USB drives on your PC or laptop. Flash media data retrieval tool supports all major brands of removable media such as Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, Canon, Fujifilm, SanDisk, HP etc. Multimedia data salvage program recovers mp3, mp4 songs, video games from compact flash memory card of your digital device like iPod, music players in less amount of time. Software can easily runs on any window based operating system and provides facility to restores selected and complete data by following some easy recovery steps. Features:* Removable media data rescue software is reliable program to fastly recover entire virus infected pictures, text files and other relevant data from all USB removable media.* USB media files recovery tool instantly display unrecognized audio, video folders which cannot access by your digital device. * Smart drive data restoration tool quickly restores lost files from undetected hard drives and saves data in safe place.* Application has facility to consistently retrieve encrypted files folders along with their exact name, color and size from removable thumb, pen drive.

[read more]

item.title: Camera Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Have you ever lost your memorable moments photographs from your digital device? Then, use Camera Recovery Software which provides facility of disk scanning method to restore inaccessible data from digital camera. File retrieval tool rescues corrupted photographs, images, pictures and audio-video clips etc from digital camera device. Data revival program recovers deleted photographs and images from digital SLR camera.

[read more]

item.title: Disk Media Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Disk Media Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Disk Media Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Forgotten data retrieval wizard is reliable and powerful tool which restores lost, corrupted or forgotten documents from various removable storage devices including External hard disk drive, Portable flash memory devices, PDA device, Mp3 player, Digital audio player. Disk media restoration application retrieves all missing files with major file extensions including wav, bmp, gif, midi, jpeg, jpg etc file formats. Deleted files unmask tool recovers all deleted files lost due to various reasons like human error, Virus corrupted drives, Formatted drives, Electricity fault, Logically crashed USB drives, Software/Hardware faults. Deleted data undelete software recovers permanently deleted data or even data when statements like Drive not formatted gets displayed on your monitor. Missing files rescue tool has interactive tree hierarchy which facilitates quick searching and retrieval of all your deleted or forgotten folders from your computer system. Removable media data recovery tool is applicable with all major Windows operating systems like Windows 11, 10, 8 and etc.Features:* Removable media folders rescue tool efficiently recovers all your deleted, forgotten or missing files or folders from various storage devices.* Forgotten data recovery software supports various removable storage media devices including Portable flash memory devices, PDA device, Mp3 player, Digital audio player, etc.* Deleted data salvage utility has tree structure which facilitates advance searching and restores all your documents at user specified location.* Deleted data undelete application provides thumbnail preview of all your deleted data before actual recovery.* Media folders unmask wizard is easy to operate due to graphical interface.

[read more]
item.description:
Disk Media Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Forgotten data retrieval wizard is reliable and powerful tool which restores lost, corrupted or forgotten documents from various removable storage devices including External hard disk drive, Portable flash memory devices, PDA device, Mp3 player, Digital audio player. Disk media restoration application retrieves all missing files with major file extensions including wav, bmp, gif, midi, jpeg, jpg etc file formats. Deleted files unmask tool recovers all deleted files lost due to various reasons like human error, Virus corrupted drives, Formatted drives, Electricity fault, Logically crashed USB drives, Software/Hardware faults. Deleted data undelete software recovers permanently deleted data or even data when statements like Drive not formatted gets displayed on your monitor. Missing files rescue tool has interactive tree hierarchy which facilitates quick searching and retrieval of all your deleted or forgotten folders from your computer system. Removable media data recovery tool is applicable with all major Windows operating systems like Windows 11, 10, 8 and etc.Features:* Removable media folders rescue tool efficiently recovers all your deleted, forgotten or missing files or folders from various storage devices.* Forgotten data recovery software supports various removable storage media devices including Portable flash memory devices, PDA device, Mp3 player, Digital audio player, etc.* Deleted data salvage utility has tree structure which facilitates advance searching and restores all your documents at user specified location.* Deleted data undelete application provides thumbnail preview of all your deleted data before actual recovery.* Media folders unmask wizard is easy to operate due to graphical interface.

[read more]

Removable media data recovery tool is applicable with all major Windows operating systems like Windows 11, 10, 8 and etc.Features:* Removable media folders rescue tool efficiently recovers all your deleted, forgotten or missing files or folders from various storage devices.* Forgotten data recovery software supports various removable storage media devices including Portable flash memory devices, PDA device, Mp3 player, Digital audio player, etc.* Deleted data salvage utility has tree structure which facilitates advance searching and restores all your documents at user specified location.* Deleted data undelete application provides thumbnail preview of all your deleted data before actual recovery.* Media folders unmask wizard is easy to operate due to graphical interface.

item.title: castle-app v188 Download For Android [Racing]
item.itunes:title: castle-app v188 Download For Android [Racing]
item.itunes:author: biboboboi02
item.itunes:summary:
castle-app v188 Download For Android
(Racing)
Explore Castle App: Smart Security Solution for Your Home
As life becomes increasingly busy, ensuring the security of your home is crucial. Castle is a breakthrough app that offers a modern, easy-to-use, and intelligent security solution for every household. Let's discover the fantastic features of Castle and why it should become an essential part of your life.

1. Why Choose Castle?
Castle is a comprehensive security app that integrates the latest technologies to protect your home. With Castle, you will experience:

Smart Camera System: Castle incorporates high-end cameras, allowing you to monitor your home remotely from anywhere. Facial recognition and alert features will help ensure safety for your family and belongings.
[read more]

item.title: USB Drive Data Salvage Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Data Salvage Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Data Salvage Software
(Utilities)
Pen drive data undelete tool is used to recover lost, missing, corrupted, formatted files and folders from logically crashed USB storage devices. Files retrieval utility recover deleted word, excel, power point documents and rescue txt, ppt, mp3, html, pdf etc digital files from virus infected pen drive or other USB digital storage media. USB drive data retrieval tool recovers corrupted pictures, images, mp3 music songs, video clips and text documents from any device which can be accessed via USB port. USB drive data retrieval utility also provides a complete scanning of the logically crashed or corrupted disk to locate and restore the lost and deleted files and folders in a tree structure format. Pen drive data restoration tool is quick, simple and easy to use with interactive graphical user interface (GUI) and does not require any technical knowledge to operate the software. Memory stick data restoration program is a fastest data retrieval utility that supports all windows operating system such as windows 11, 10, 8, XP. Thumb drive files undelete utility used to recover deleted files, formatted folders lost due to accidental format, improper functioning of the disk drive, power failure and virus attack problem. Data restoration application supports various manufactures of USB drives including Sony, Samsung, SanDisk, Transcend, Apacer, Kingston and Toshiba in all capacities e.g. 64MB, 128MB, 256MB, 512MB, 1GB, 2GB, 4GB etc.Software Features:* USB drive data recovery software ensures data recovery from accidentally deleted files and folders.* Utility provides user friendly Graphical User Interface so it is easy to use and operate.* Software support all type of USB drives of all capacities like 64MB, 128MB, 256MB, 1GB, 4GB etc.* Software does not need any technical skills to operate it.* Pen drive data recovery software is easy to use read-only utility.

[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)

item.title: GB Whatsapp APK 17.70 Free Download Latest Version [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: GB Whatsapp APK 17.70 Free Download Latest Version [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: biboboboi02
item.itunes:summary:
GB Whatsapp APK 17.70 Free Download Latest Version
(Arcade)
Known as a customized version of the original WhatsApp application, GB WhatsApp APK 17.70 has garnered significant attention from users worldwide. With its unique and versatile features compared to the official WhatsApp version, GB WhatsApp stands out as one of the most downloaded applications within the Android user community.
Highlights of GB WhatsApp APK 17.70
Advanced Privacy Mode: GB WhatsApp allows users to have more control over their privacy settings. Users can hide their online status, hide read messages, and even hide typing status. This helps users maintain their privacy without worrying about being monitored by others on the app.
[read more]

GB Whatsapp APK 17.70 Free Download Latest Version

item.title: Flash Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]

item.itunes:author: datarecovery-1
item.itunes:summary:
Flash Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Flash Drive Data Recovery application provides simplified solution to bring back misplaced images, wallpapers and photos from various branded mass storage devices due to pulling out of device from PC while it is in still use provided in less time.
